citations.description: Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart: 'Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 before submit + close.' — votes are explicitly pending, not attested as received.

findings.criterion: Single Gerrit change; lands only after LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1.
findings.detail: The ticket comment names Gerrit change 809 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/809) as pushed, but explicitly states it is 'Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 before submit + close.' The required approvals are not recorded as received — the comment describes a pending state, not an attested outcome. The criterion requires both votes to have landed before this ticket can close.
findings.remediation: Once LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 are granted and the change is submitted, record a follow-up ticket comment naming the Gerrit change URL, the specific vote scores received, the reviewer identities, and the submit timestamp so the criterion is concretely attested.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
